examples: He uses a hydraulic hoist to unload two empty barrels.
Smaller sails are lighter, easier to hoist and trim, and smaller to stow.
By using a hoist the movers were able to sling the piano to the third floor.
It was like watching Atlas gear up to hoist that big boulder we now live on.
There is a small, glass-enclosed room where pieces of the original hoist have been preserved.
